pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release configuration in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to specify the target JDK version in modern Maven compiler plugin configurations, ensuring consistent module path and API usage.

wire-di-annotations/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 in the module's POM to align with the target JDK.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/pom.xm.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace or supplement Java EE annotations.
Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace or supplement Java EE annotations.

wire-di-processor-development-kit/src/ma.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
Migrate instanceof check to use pattern matching for more concise code.

Add jakarta.annotation-api dependency to support Jakarta EE namespace migration.

wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used with index 0; using getFirst() avoids deprecation warnings and prepares for future removal.

wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used with index 0; using getFirst() avoids deprecation warnings and prepares for future removal.

wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
wire-di-processor/src/main/java/com/gith.why_exists: List.get(0) is not a compile error, but List.getFirst() is the preferred modern API; however, since get(0) still compiles and runs on Java 21, this is technically a polishment unless the project enforces strict modern API usage. Given the rule 'Default to polishment when in doubt' and that get(0) works on J21, this is polishment.

wire-di-runtime-environment/pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace or supplement the older javax.inject API.

wire-di-runtime-environment/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
wire-di-runtime-environment/src/main/jav.why_exists: List.get(int) is not deprecated, but List.getFirst() is the preferred API in Java 21+ for clarity and safety; however, this is technically a polishment as get(0) still compiles and runs. Wait, the prompt says 'breaking ONLY if the migration won't compile or run'. get(0) works on J21. So this is polishment.
